form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5/6 on April 2 over 300m at this track behind Happy But Poor beaten 5.5 lengths (17.59). Had been in strong form, hitting the frame three times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

form.formComment: Placed last time (16.18) at Cannington in a Grade 6, finishing second and beaten half a length. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from six starts. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.
